prompt: A clean white-background anime illustration of two teenage girls standing side by side, shown from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle, with a stylish monochrome-and-accent-color look, crisp inked linework, manga screentone shading, subtle halftone texture, and slight cyan-magenta print-registration offset for a modern graphic feel. The girl on the left has very long pale silver-white hair fading into vivid electric blue at the ends, styled in 2 small round buns with the rest flowing down, large light blue eyes, and a calm slightly curious expression. She wears a school uniform with a white blouse, a black sleeveless sweater vest, a pleated dark skirt, a bright blue ribbon bow at the collar, white socks, and black loafers, with both hands held behind her back and her body leaning forward slightly. The girl on the right has rich deep purple hair in a high ponytail with loose layered strands, golden amber eyes, and a cool reserved expression; she wears a metallic hair clip reading AI. Her outfit is a sporty streetwear school look: an oversized white jacket with bold purple trim and hood lining, a gray top underneath, short bottoms mostly hidden by the jacket, white socks, and purple high-top sneakers, with both hands in her jacket pockets. Keep the composition balanced with the left girl slightly left-of-center and the right girl slightly right-of-center, both looking up toward the viewer. Add abstract black shadow bars and dotted halftone shapes beneath and around them instead of a detailed environment. Emphasize a polished hybrid of manga illustration and contemporary anime key visual design, high contrast, minimal background, fashionable "flashy hair day" mood, and a cool creative duo atmosphere.
